calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,280p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73281702 --event evt-petition-disposition && find data/cases/scotus/73281702 -maxdepth 6 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73281702 --event evt-petition-disposition; find data/cases/scotus/73281702 -maxdepth 8 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73281702/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml; sed -n '1,320p' data/cases/scotus/73281702/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json; sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73281702/record/documents/documents.json; wc -l -c data/cases/scotus/73281702/record/documents/questions-presented.txt data/cases/scotus/73281702/record/documents/petition.txt; sed -n '1,220p' data/cases/scotus/73281702/record/documents/questions-presented.txt"

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,760p' data/cases/scotus/73281702/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '761,1180p' data/cases/scotus/73281702/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"Constitutionality|constitutional|Section 21.02|Richardson|Ramos\" data/cases/scotus/73281702/record/documents/petition.txt | tail -60; sed -n '1280,1544p' data/cases/scotus/73281702/record/documents/petition.txt; sed -n '1,200p' data/cases/scotus/73281702/record/context.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);
const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|citation|search/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(matches);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"Modern discretionary-cert|Segment base rate|relist|CVSG|Response|paid|Paid|Circuit|state\" metrics/statpack.md | head -120; sed -n '1,260p' metrics/statpack.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '130,240p' metrics/statpack.md; jq '.cert_by_term // .scotus_cert_by_term // .terms // keys' metrics/statpack.json 2>/dev/null | head -100; rg -n 'salience|fee_class|paid' metrics/statpack.json | head -30","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --citation 'Ramos v. Louisiana' --era 2020s --limit 8 2>&1; UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --citation 'Richardson v. United States' --era 2020s --limit 8 2>&1","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);
{"cell_id": "13", "max_tokens": 30000, "yield_time_ms": 30000}

const t = ALL_TOOLS.find(x=>x.name==="mcp__courtlistener__search"); if(!t){text("missing");exit();} const r=await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"continuous sexual abuse\" unanimity Richardson Ramos",filed_before:"2026-04-15",num_results:10,fields:["caseName","court","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","status","snippet"]}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) c.type==="image"?image(c):text(c.text||c);

const r=await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"(\"continuous sexual abuse\" OR \"continuous course of sexual abuse\") \"jury unanimity\"",filed_before:"2026-04-15",num_results:20,fields:["caseName","court","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","status"]}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) c.type==="image"?image(c):text(c.text||c);

const r=await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",case_name:"State v. Young",citation:"502 P.3d 45",num_results:5,fields:["caseName","court","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","opinions"]}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) c.type==="image"?image(c):text(c.text||c);

const r=await tools.mcp__courtlistener__get_endpoint_item({endpoint_id:"opinions",item_id:5123789,fields:["id","html_with_citations"]}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) c.type==="image"?image(c):text(c.text||c);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ; mkdir -p data/cases/scotus/73281702/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T134540Z","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data; git status --short; find data/cases/scotus/73281702/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T134540Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\\n' | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);
